title: Crispy Middle Eastern Squash Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly, dairy-free, and crispy Middle Eastern dish featuring grilled ancho chili squash with a touch of tanginess from lemon juice.
instructions: Preheat your grill or use a pan for grilling the squash. Season with salt and grilled until tender but still crisp.
While the squash is grilling, finely chop the garlic and ancho chili.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil and lemon juice to create a dressing.
Once the squash is done, remove from heat and let it cool slightly before slicing into strips.
Combine grilled squash with chopped garlic, chili, and dressing in a large mixing bowl. Stir until evenly coated.
Add mint leaves and toss gently to combine.
Serve immediately as a snack or appetizer.
